regions.name: Capital Region
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from May to September for warm weather and vibrant street life in Copenhagen.

regions.name: Copenhagen Region
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit May to September for pleasant weather and vibrant street life in Denmark's capital.

regions.name: North Zealand
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit spring through autumn to explore royal castles and coastal landscapes near Copenhagen.

regions.name: Zealand
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Best visited from June to August for pleasant weather and festival season.

regions.name: Funen
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit May to September for the garden island's pastoral landscapes and Hans Christian Andersen heritage.

regions.name: West Zealand
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit May to October for pleasant countryside exploration and medieval town visits.

regions.name: South Denmark
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Best from June to August for beach activities and warm weather on the peninsula.

regions.name: South Zealand
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit June to August for warm weather and beach activities along the coast.

regions.name: Central Jutland
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit May to October for rolling hills, forests, and family attractions in Denmark's heartland.

regions.name: Lolland-Falster
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit May to September for cycling, beaches, and charming island villages.

regions.name: North Jutland
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Best from June to August for beach activities and the midnight sun experience.

regions.name: Bornholm
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit May to September for dramatic granite cliffs, artist communities, and Baltic Sea views.

regions.name: South Jutland
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit April to October to explore border history, castles, and the Wadden Sea marshlands.

regions.name: Eastern Jutland
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit May to September for cultural attractions, coastal fjords, and Denmark's second-largest city.

regions.name: Northern Jutland
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit June to August for northern beaches, Skagen's twin seas, and the Limfjord region.
